name: brainkit
origin: TODO: set to the git URL or local path you vendored brainkit from — its OWN repo, never loopkit (an origin pointing at loopkit would offer loopkit's skills as brainkit's on the next sync)
note: managed_files lists the machinery files upstream owns — the candidates the `sync` SKILL compares against canonical brainkit. sync is an agent-run curation task, NOT a script: it surfaces what changed upstream and pulls in only the improvements you approve, merging rather than clobbering any local tweaks you've made to these files (see .claude/skills/sync/SKILL.md). Everything NOT listed here is yours and is out of scope for sync: PROJECT.md, your knowledge/ notes and golden/, your knowledge/templates/ type notes, the starter knowledge/index.md, and your work/ deliverables. The starter type templates under knowledge/templates/ are SEED-ONCE: shipped in this fork and deliberately ABSENT from managed_files, so sync never offers to change them (the tradeoff: template fixes in a later release won't be surfaced for an existing vault — the price of you owning them).
